description: No dedicated Output Format section; the skill's outputs to orchestrating callers (phase completion state, AskUserQuestion interaction, Review Queue schema) are documented only implicitly inside code examples.
suggested_fix: Add a ## Output Format section that explicitly lists what the orchestrator returns: workflowState.completePhase/failPhase shape and the Review Queue JSON schema.

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' in instruction text: 'Add to relevant section (Validation Suite, Installation, etc.)' — leaves ambiguity about which section to update.
suggested_fix: Replace with the specific section name or enumerate the candidate sections so the instruction is deterministic.
